category_sources: source_facts.description says Minify HTML or XML; official Google Code archive identifies the htmlcompressor project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is htmlcompressor; Maven metadata and project naming use HTML Compressor / HtmlCompressor.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the archived Google Code project; archived project JavaDoc under htmlcompressor.googlecode.com is the best official API documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Google Code archive; the archive source page is the official archived source-control surface for the original project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source archive indicate an HTML/XML minifier distributed as a Java jar; Maven metadata describes an HTML Compressor and Minifier.
